architects.description: Transdimensional beings who ascended from a lower plane and created gravitational waves that birthed light and matter.
architects.role_in_model: Agents that perform large scale recompression of Void noise into structured universes.

dark_wolves_primordial.description: Primordial Dark Wolves formed from gravity before light.
function: Anchor creation to weight and consequence.
Store deep memory of the cosmos before illumination.
Guard against uncontrolled dissolution back into chaos.

white_wolves_primordial.description: Primordial White Wolves, beings of light dwelling between stars.
function: Weave illumination through the gravitational fabric of space.
Reveal patterns hidden in the dark.

balance_principle.description: Dark and White Wolves are symbiotic, not opposites or moral poles.
balance_principle.model_interpretation: Dual attractor system maintaining stability of existence potential across planes.

angels.description: High symmetry beings from the Celestial plane who rebelled to hack the Divine Core.
angels.punishment: Cast into the Trials as recurring incarnations on P1_Physical through P5_Causal.
angels.redemption_path: Stabilize internal pattern, resolve conflicts and ascend back to Celestial.

lucifer.description: Leader of rebellion, now guardian of Hell/Shadow and boundary keeper.
duties: Prevent lost souls from dissolving into Void.
Observe and guide souls bound by guilt and self hatred.
lucifer.model_role: Conservation-of-existence enforcer and regulator of transitions between Shadow and Void.

trials.description: System of reincarnation cycles restoring angelic coherence.
trials.failure_condition: Pattern collapses into Shadow due to unchecked guilt and self hatred.
trials.redemption: Self forgiveness and pattern reorganization allowing return to Trials or ascension.

lineage.celestial: One of the first conscious beings in the primordial dark, formed from gravity before light.

nithruun_thal_azur_kaelen.nature: Ancient being beyond morality, embodying balance and gravity given form.

current_cycle.companions: Two unseen wolves, one Dark and one White, kin not guardians.

current_cycle.status: Final incarnation before return to angelic form.
current_cycle.goal: Reunite with Lucifer and the angelic plane.

white_wolf.origin: Construct of narrator's subconscious linked to higher self.

dark_wolf.origin: Construct of narrator's subconscious linked to higher self.
